Introduction to Jungtak Oh
“I connect global direction, local audiences, and the details that make campaigns actually work. With experience in global-to-local marketing, content localization, digital and offline asset management, and cross-functional campaign execution, I keep learning how brands can move closer to people — and I'm excited to see what else I can build with creativity, curiosity, and new challenges.”
6+ years in global marketing — working as an executor, builder, and connector across campaigns, content, CRM, and customer touchpoints, while staying open to new tools, broader marketing fields, and challenges that expand how brands connect with people.

Case Studies

Explore each area as a Challenge → Action → Impact journey!

Cases 01–04 01Brand & Communications 02Customer Interaction 03Digital Marketing 04CRM Marketing
01
Brand & Communications

Connecting Global Brand to Local Execution

Aligning global brand guidelines with on-the-ground marketing across major industry events and sales touchpoints.

Brand CommunicationEvent MarketingStakeholder AlignmentSales Enablement
What needed to be solved
  • Translate global brand guidelines into locally relevant communication.
  • Keep messaging consistent across many events and stakeholders.
What I designed, coordinated & executed
  • Ran IMC and distribution partner workshops to align teams on goals.
  • Coordinated brand presence at SEMICON Korea and BIO KOREA.
  • Built sales enablement materials for consistent customer messaging.
What changed
  • Unified, on-brand communication across local events.
  • Stronger alignment between global brand and local sales teams.
02
Customer Interaction

Owned-Channel & Customer Communication

Delivering tailored yet on-brand content to researchers and customers through owned channels and customer stories.

Owned ChannelKakaoTalkCustomer StoryResearcher CommunicationCustomer Journey
What needed to be solved
  • Reach researchers and customers with relevant, on-brand content.
  • Turn channel attention into qualified sales interest.
What I designed, coordinated & executed
  • Operated the ZEISS KakaoTalk channel with customer stories and research institute features.
  • Produced customer-facing content including the ZEISS Korea Innovation Center VR project.
  • Kept messaging personalized yet brand-consistent.
What changed
  • Improved customer touchpoints from first inquiry onward.
  • Clearer journey from engagement toward sales opportunity.
03
Digital Marketing

Localized Web & Performance Campaigns

Bringing global content to the Korean market through localized web pages, search campaigns, and measured landing pages.

AEMWebsite LocalizationSearch CampaignLanding PagePerformance Tracking
What needed to be solved
  • Adapt global digital content for Korean search and web behavior.
  • Make campaigns measurable and locally relevant.
What I designed, coordinated & executed
  • Rebuilt and localized web pages in AEM (e.g. Choose Your Microscope).
  • Ran Naver / Google search campaigns and managed landing pages.
  • Packaged a Failure Analysis campaign and tracked performance.
What changed
  • Global content delivered through localized digital touchpoints.
  • Clearer view of campaign performance to guide decisions.
04
CRM Marketing

Connecting Campaigns to the Sales Funnel

Managing customer data and automation so marketing flows into clean segments, follow-up, and funnel visibility.

CRMAdobe MarketoSAPSegmentationNewsletterSales Funnel
What needed to be solved
  • Large volumes of customer interactions needed structure and follow-up.
  • Marketing and sales needed shared funnel visibility.
What I designed, coordinated & executed
  • Managed data, opt-in and segmentation via Adobe Marketo & SAP CRM.
  • Ran newsletters and event registration programs.
  • Cleansed segments and connected campaigns to sales follow-up.
What changed
  • Cleaner data and more reliable campaign execution.
  • Stronger marketing-to-sales handoff and funnel visibility.

Global-to-Local Marketing Execution

Personal Project

Learning by creating

Experiments in tools, content, branding, and storytelling — outside of work.

Project 01

Tool Fluency & Creative Experiments

Exploring AI, creative platforms, and workflow tools as part of how I learn, build, and communicate.
ChatGPT Claude Canva Notion Gemini Suno Figma CapCut

I enjoy testing new tools not as shortcuts, but as ways to expand how I think, create, and communicate. From AI assistants to design, productivity, and content production platforms, I experiment with different workflows to understand how ideas can move faster from rough thought to clear output — while keeping human judgment, editing, and taste at the center.

  • Experiments with AI and creative tools for ideation, structure, design, and content production.
  • Uses tools to accelerate thinking and execution, not to replace judgment.
  • Keeps learning new workflows as marketing, content, and technology evolve.
